buggy_code:
features = np.dstack(inputs)
outcome = returns.flatten()
features = features.reshape(-1, n_features)
clean_code:
lagged_returns = np.roll(returns, 1, axis=0)
lagged_returns[0] = np.nan
features = np.dstack(inputs)
outcome = lagged_returns.flatten()
features = features.reshape(-1, n_features)
description: Features and returns are stacked and flattened without any temporal lag between them.
explanation: np.dstack(inputs) and returns.flatten() are aligned at the same time index. The model is trained to predict returns at time T using features also from time T, which constitutes lookahead bias. The return at time T is not known until after time T closes.
suggested_fix: Lag returns by one period before training: lagged_returns = np.roll(returns, 1, axis=0). Set first row to NaN and filter before fitting.
